definitions.text: The ordinal form of the cardinal number three; Coming after the second.
examples: The third tree from the left is my favorite.

definitions.text: The person or thing in the third position.
One of three equal parts of a whole.
examples: He ate a third of the pie. Divided by two-thirds.

definitions.text: To agree with a proposition or statement after it has already been seconded.
To divide into three equal parts.
